name: Meat Ball Stroganoff
recipeInstructions:
- Combine all ingredients for meat balls thoroughly. Shape into 24 meatballs and brown in a small amount of shortening in a large skillet.
- For the sauce, combine cream of mushroom soup (10 1/2 oz), water (1 c), mushroom stems and pieces (1 cn, about 4 oz) with liquid, tomato paste (2 tb), all-purpose flour (1 tb), and dairy sour cream (1/3 c).
- Pour the sauce over the browned meatballs. Cover and simmer for about 30 minutes.
- Combine flour with cold water (2 tb) to form a slurry; add to the sauce and blend well. Simmer for an additional 5 minutes or until thickened.
- Just before serving, stir in the sour cream. Serve over hot buttered rice.
Source: Our Favorites for family and friends
Reprinted with permission from The Quaker Oats Company
